name: Nick Swardson
blurb: He is known for his recurring role as Terry Bernadino on Reno 911!, his long collaboration with Adam Sandler's Happy Madison, and his sketch series Nick Swardson's Pretend Time.
bio: Nick Swardson is an American stand-up comedian, actor, screenwriter, and producer from Minnesota who started in stand-up at eighteen. He is known for his recurring role as Terry Bernadino on Reno 911!, his long collaboration with Adam Sandler's Happy Madison, and his sketch series Nick Swardson's Pretend Time. His stand-up specials include the platinum-certified album Party and the Comedy Central special Seriously, Who Farted?.

timeline.ev: Begins his role as Terry Bernadino on Reno 911!
Releases Comedy Central special Seriously, Who Farted?
Launches sketch series Nick Swardson's Pretend Time
Releases Comedy Central special Taste It

accolades: Among the youngest comedians to perform on Late Show with David Letterman
Won the Funniest Person in the Twin Cities award early in his career

movies_tv.t: Star vs. the Forces of Evil
